name: Minimal change
when_to_use: Reuse before adding; subtract; avoid the wrong abstraction

name: Legible change
when_to_use: Name precisely; keep control flow visible; write for the next reader

name: Respect boundaries
when_to_use: Keep dependency direction right; prefer deep modules; don't leak across seams

name: Protect parallelism
when_to_use: Check blast radius before editing; don't destabilize a shared contract
